articles.title: MakerDAO boosts DAI lending capabilities via Spark Protocol roll-out
articles.description: MakerDAO has introduced Spark, a DeFi lending protocol that enables users to borrow dai (DAI) stablecoin.

articles.title: Pepe’s sudden drop leaves whale 500k in the red
articles.description: A memecoin whale who purchased roughly $3 million worth of the Pepe token just days ago is now sitting on an unrealized loss of around $600,000.
